'''Isshaddik''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] criminal who was [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and joined the crew of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']] along with his mate, [[Dewlannamapia]]. Isshaddik performed [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] raids on behalf of ''Trader's Luck''{{'s}} [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Garris Shrike]], and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] during one such raid to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nar Hekka]].

==Biography==
Isshaddik was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]], the mate of [[Dewlannamapia]], and the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of several cubs.<ref name="TPS" /> When translated from the Wookiee [[Language/Legends|language]] of [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]] to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], Isshaddik's name could be roughly interpreted as "dark sentinel."<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> Around [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="Exile date">''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' places Isshaddik's [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exile]] ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the events of the novel, which is approximately dated to [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]] by ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.</ref> Isshaddik was [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] for a crime he had committed.<ref name="TPS" />

Although she was not required to do so, Dewlannamapia followed Isshaddik into exile, leaving behind her home and their cubs. The two joined the crew of [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']], a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] crewed with criminals and [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Garris Shrike]]. Isshaddik started participating in Shrike's criminal activities, working for him as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. Only a [[19 BBY/Legends|year later]], however, he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during a smuggling run to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nar Hekka]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. After his death, Dewlannamapia remained aboard ''Trader's Luck'' and befriended a young [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] boy named [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who was working for Shrike.<ref name="TPS" /> Around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]],<ref name="Death date D">''[[The Paradise Snare]]'', which features [[Dewlannamapia]]'s [[Death/Legends|death]], is approximately dated to [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]] by ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Dewlannamapia sacrificed her life while helping Solo escape from Shrike and pursue his dreams.<ref name="TPS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Isshaddik was first mentioned in ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'', a [[1997]] novel written by [[A. C. Crispin]].<ref name="TPS" /> ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[August]] of [[2003]], included a translation of some common Wookiee name prefixes. Due to the complexity of Shyriiwook, each part of a Wookiee's name is translated separately. According to ''Galactic Campaign Guide'', "Issh" means "black, dangerous, dark, deep," while "addik" means "guardian, guard, sentinel."<ref name="GCG" />
